untranslatable_reason: Signal requires visual pattern recognition (Broadening Formation identification with specific trend-line boundaries and formation height measurement) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. The entry condition 'Formation identified as Broadening Formation' requires pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. Exit conditions also reference formation height computation relative to trend-lines, which requires geometric pattern analysis beyond indicator capability.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels to simulate breakout confirmation outside trend boundaries, but this does not capture the specific broadening pattern geometry or the formation height measurement rule (63% success rate for upward breakouts). The 'wait for confirmation with price closing outside the trend-line boundary' was approximated using dc_upper/dc_lower crossovers, but this is not equivalent to the original pattern-based signal. Manual chart review required for accurate pattern identification.
